nasb.text: For many fell slain, because the war was of God. And they settled in their place until the exile.

esv.text: For many fell, because the war was of God. And they lived in their place until the exile.

cnv.text: 因為這場戰爭是出於　神，所以敵人被殺的很多；他們就佔領了敵人的地方，直到被擄的時候。

ccb.text: 敌人伤亡惨重，因为他们有上帝的帮助。他们占据敌人的土地，一直到被掳的时候。
